scope: Exact tariff parser backlog for routes where benchmark or mixed official estimates still need tariff-line, add-on duty, or trade-remedy scope resolution.

priorities.next_action: Require exact tariff line / scope before promoting to official exact rate.
priorities.why_priority: CN->US solar remains a high-impact backlog because US exact duty may change with Section 301, trade-remedy scope, or exclusion status.
rate_change_drivers: Exact tariff-line scope can change the final payable rate.
US Section 301 Chapter 99 coverage and exclusion status can change add-on duty.
Solar AD/CVD scope, origin evidence, and deposit period can change the duty exposure.
priorities.parser_scope: Resolve exact HTS 854143 line, AD/CVD case scope, origin-route evidence, and Section 301 Chapter 99/exclusion before using the rate for filing.
